indicators.name: no bed or resting surface
indicators.rationale: The absence of a bed or any resting surface makes this space unsuitable for sleep.

indicators.name: no furniture or personal items
indicators.rationale: The lack of furniture or personal items suggests this is not a living space suitable for sleep.

indicators.name: no windows or curtains
indicators.rationale: No windows or curtains make it impossible to control light and privacy, key aspects of sleep.

indicators.name: no lighting control
indicators.rationale: The bright artificial lighting is not conducive to sleep.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for sleep (primary). There is no bed or resting surface, no furniture or personal items, no windows or curtains to control light and privacy, and bright artificial lighting that is not conducive to sleep.
